scripts.test: npm run test:repo && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.test:repo: node --test scripts/*.test.mjs && node scripts/check-docs-guard.mjs && node scripts/mirror-skills.mjs --check
scripts.lint: tsc --noEmit --project packages/daemon/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/ui/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/cli/tsconfig.json
